meta.purpose: Universal Destiny 2 chronological progression map - from New Light to current content

contentStatus.vaultedKiosk: Activity vaulted but rewards available at Monument to Lost Lights

backbone.narrative: The Red Legion, led by Dominus Ghaul, attacks the Last City and strips Guardians of their Light. You must reclaim your power and unite scattered allies to retake the City.

campaigns.name: Red War Campaign
campaigns.description: The original Destiny 2 campaign. Reclaim the Light, defeat Ghaul.

raids.name: Leviathan
raids.description: Emperor Calus invites Guardians to prove their worth aboard his massive ship.

weapons.name: MIDA Multi-Tool
weapons.description: Radar stays active while ADS. Increased movement speed.

weapons.name: Sturm
weapons.source: Quest: Relics of the Golden Age
weapons.description: Kills with Drang reload Sturm and overflow magazine.

weapons.name: Rat King
weapons.catalystSource: Strikes with fireteam using Rat King
weapons.description: Grows stronger with each fireteam member using it.

weapons.name: Coldheart
weapons.description: Cold Fusion - Damage increases the longer you stay on target.

weapons.name: Sunshot
weapons.description: Targets explode on kill. Explosions cause other targets to explode.

weapons.name: Graviton Lance
weapons.description: Second shot rips a hole through spacetime. Kills create seekers.

weapons.name: Sweet Business
weapons.description: Minigun that spins up over time. Picks up ammo automatically.

weapons.name: Vigilance Wing
weapons.description: 5-round burst. Heals and increases speed when allies die nearby.

weapons.name: Riskrunner
weapons.description: Taking Arc damage supercharges this weapon. Chain lightning on kills.

weapons.name: Hard Light
weapons.description: Rounds have no damage falloff and bounce off surfaces. Hold reload to swap element.

weapons.name: Merciless
weapons.description: Charge time decreases with each non-lethal hit.

weapons.name: Fighting Lion
weapons.description: Lightweight GL with remote detonation. Kills reload from reserves.

weapons.name: Legend of Acrius
weapons.description: Massive Arc slug shotgun. Extended range with massive damage.

weapons.name: The Wardcliff Coil
weapons.description: Fires a volley of tracking rockets in a spread.

weapons.name: D.A.R.C.I.
weapons.description: Personal assistant AI. Bonus precision damage after scoping a target.

weapons.name: Tractor Cannon
weapons.description: Repulsor blast pushes targets and applies Void weaken debuff.

weapons.name: The Prospector
weapons.description: Grenades stick and can be remote detonated. Hold fire to launch full clip.

hunter.name: Celestial Nighthawk
hunter.description: Golden Gun fires single high-damage shot.

hunter.name: Knucklehead Radar
hunter.description: Radar stays active while ADS.

hunter.name: Foetracer
hunter.description: Mark and track targets. Bonus damage to low-health marked.

hunter.name: Young Ahamkara's Spine
hunter.description: Tripmine Grenades gain enhanced tracking and duration.

hunter.name: Mechaneer's Tricksleeves
hunter.description: Sidearm ready/reload speed increased. Damage boost when critically wounded.

hunter.name: Lucky Raspberry
hunter.description: Arcbolt Grenades chain further and can recharge on hit.

hunter.name: Raiden Flux
hunter.description: Quick successive Arc Staff hits increase damage and extend duration.

hunter.name: Lucky Pants
hunter.description: Hand Cannon precision hits load rounds. Stacking damage buff.

hunter.name: ST0MP-EE5
hunter.description: Increased sprint speed, slide distance, and jump height.

hunter.name: Orpheus Rig
hunter.description: Tethered enemies grant ability energy.

titan.name: Insurmountable Skullfort
titan.description: Arc melee kills heal you and recharge melee.

titan.name: Mask of the Quiet One
titan.description: Ability energy on damage taken. Ability kills heal.

titan.name: An Insurmountable Skullfort
titan.description: Arc melee kills heal and recharge melee instantly.

titan.name: ACD/0 Feedback Fence
titan.description: Melee hits build energy. Taking melee damage releases burst.

titan.name: Synthoceps
titan.description: Increased melee range. Bonus damage when surrounded.

titan.name: Doom Fang Pauldron
titan.description: Shield Throw kills grant Shield Throw energy and Super.

titan.name: Actium War Rig
titan.description: Steadily reloads Auto Rifles and Machine Guns from reserves.

titan.name: Crest of Alpha Lupi
titan.description: Generates orbs on Barricade cast. Barricade heals allies.

titan.name: Hallowfire Heart
titan.description: Greatly increased Solar ability regen with full Super.

titan.name: Lion Rampant
titan.description: Hip-fire weapons while Lifting. Extended Lift duration.

titan.name: Dunemarchers
titan.description: Increased sprint speed. Sprinting builds charge for chain lightning melee.

titan.name: Peacekeepers
titan.description: SMGs reload holstered and ready instantly.

warlock.name: Eye of Another World
warlock.description: Highlights targets. Improved ability regeneration.

warlock.name: Nezarec's Sin
warlock.description: Void kills grant ability energy for all abilities.

warlock.name: Skull of Dire Ahamkara
warlock.description: Nova Bomb kills grant Super energy.

warlock.name: Crown of Tempests
warlock.description: Arc ability kills increase Arc ability regen.

warlock.name: Sunbracers
warlock.description: Solar melee kills grant unlimited Solar grenades briefly.

warlock.name: Winter's Guile
warlock.description: Melee kills increase melee damage temporarily. Stacks.

warlock.name: Karnstein Armlets
warlock.description: Melee attacks heal you and grant continued healing.

warlock.name: Starfire Protocol
warlock.description: Grants extra Fusion Grenade. Empowered weapon damage recharges grenades.

warlock.name: Wings of Sacred Dawn
warlock.description: Hover in place while ADS. Precision hits extend duration.

warlock.name: Lunafaction Boots
warlock.description: Rifts auto-reload allies' weapons and increase range.

warlock.name: Transversive Steps
warlock.description: Sprint faster. Sprinting reloads equipped weapon.

backbone.narrative: Osiris, the legendary Warlock Vanguard, is lost within the Infinite Forest on Mercury. Ikora sends you to find him and stop the Vex from simulating a dark future.

campaigns.name: Curse of Osiris Campaign
campaigns.description: Find Osiris in the Infinite Forest. Learn of the Vex's dark future simulations.

raids.name: Eater of Worlds
raids.description: A Vex Mind has invaded the Leviathan's core.

weapons.name: Prometheus Lens
weapons.description: Generates a burning heat field around the beam. Kills return ammo.

weapons.name: The Colony
weapons.description: Fires insectoid robots that chase targets.

weapons.name: The Jade Rabbit
weapons.description: Body shots return ammo and increase precision damage.

weapons.name: Crimson
weapons.description: 3-round burst. Kills heal you. Precision kills reload.

weapons.name: Telesto
weapons.description: Fires sticky Void projectiles that explode after delay. The Besto.

hunter.name: Aeon Swift
hunter.description: Aeon Cult synergy with fireteam members wearing Aeon.

titan.name: Aeon Safe
titan.description: Aeon Cult synergy with fireteam members wearing Aeon.

warlock.name: Aeon Soul
warlock.description: Aeon Cult synergy with fireteam members wearing Aeon.

backbone.narrative: The Warmind Rasputin awakens on Mars. Ana Bray investigates her family's connection to the ancient AI. Xol, the Hive Worm God, rises from the ice.

campaigns.name: Warmind Campaign
campaigns.description: Awaken Rasputin. Defeat the Hive Worm God Xol.

raids.name: Spire of Stars
raids.description: Val Ca'uor attacks the Leviathan seeking the Light.

activities.name: Escalation Protocol
activities.description: 7-wave horde activity on Mars. Exclusive weapons.

weapons.name: Sleeper Simulant
weapons.description: Bouncing laser bolts. High single-target damage.

weapons.name: Worldline Zero
weapons.description: Sprint attack teleports you forward. Speed tech for raids.

weapons.name: Polaris Lance
weapons.description: Precision hits return ammo. 4th precision hit causes explosion.

weapons.name: Borealis
weapons.description: Hold reload to change element. Breaking matching shield boosts damage.

weapons.name: Suros Regime
weapons.description: Bottom half of mag deals bonus damage and can heal.

weapons.name: Huckleberry
weapons.description: Kills reload magazine from reserves. Rampage.

hunter.name: Wormhusk Crown
hunter.description: Dodging heals you and starts health regeneration.

hunter.name: Ophidia Spathe
hunter.description: Grants two melee charges.

hunter.name: Gwisin Vest
hunter.description: Spectral Blades kills grant Super energy.

titan.name: Eternal Warrior
titan.description: Gain overshield when activating Fists of Havoc.

titan.name: Wormgod Caress
titan.description: Melee kills increase melee damage. Stacks 5x.

titan.name: Ashen Wake
titan.description: Fusion Grenades explode on impact and recharge on kills.

warlock.name: Verity's Brow
warlock.description: Energy weapon kills boost grenade damage and grant grenade energy.

warlock.name: Claws of Ahamkara
warlock.description: Grants an additional melee charge.

warlock.name: Sanguine Alchemy
warlock.description: Weapon kills in Rift extend Rift duration.

warlock.name: Apotheosis Veil
warlock.description: Immediately regenerate health on Super cast.

legendaryWeapons.name: IKELOS weapons
legendaryWeapons.note: Seraph versions available from other sources

backbone.narrative: Cayde-6 is murdered by Uldren Sov and the Scorn Barons during a prison break. You hunt them across the Tangled Shore and uncover the secrets of the Dreaming City.

campaigns.name: Forsaken Campaign
campaigns.description: Avenge Cayde-6. Hunt the Barons. Face Uldren Sov.

raids.name: Last Wish
raids.description: The greatest raid in Destiny history. Face Riven of a Thousand Voices.
secretChests: Wish Wall combinations for extra chests

dungeons.name: Shattered Throne
dungeons.availability: Available during Curse Week 3 (Strongest Curse) or anytime now
dungeons.description: A hidden dungeon in the Dreaming City. Face the taken Vorgeth and Dûl Incaru.

activities.name: Blind Well
activities.description: Tiered horde activity. Up to Tier IV (Heroic).

activities.name: Ascendant Challenges
activities.description: Weekly rotating challenge portals. Use Tincture of Queensfoil.

activities.name: Dreaming City Curse Cycle
activities.description: 3-week cycle. Week 1: Growing, Week 2: Middling, Week 3: Strongest
activities.note: Different activities and dialogue each week

weapons.name: Ace of Spades
weapons.lore: Cayde-6's personal Hand Cannon. 'The Last Hand.'
weapons.description: Firefly on precision kills. Memento Mori damage buff after reload following a kill.

weapons.name: One Thousand Voices
weapons.description: Charges a beam that creates a chain of explosions. Riven's voice.

weapons.name: Wish-Ender
weapons.description: See through walls while ADS. Over-penetrates targets.

weapons.name: Malfeasance
weapons.description: 5 stacked shots explode. Bonus damage vs Taken and Gambit invaders.

weapons.name: The Chaperone
weapons.description: Precision slug shotgun. Roadborn perk grants bonus range and handling.

weapons.name: Trinity Ghoul
weapons.description: Precision kills trigger chain lightning on next shot. With catalyst: ANY Arc kill triggers it.

weapons.name: Lord of Wolves
weapons.description: Burst-fire shrapnel shotgun. Release the Wolves mode extends burst.

weapons.name: The Queenbreaker
weapons.description: Two firing modes: Hip-fire fast charge or ADS slow charge.

weapons.name: Two-Tailed Fox
weapons.description: Fires two rockets: one Solar (burn), one Void (suppress). Third Arc rocket with catalyst.

weapons.name: Cerberus+1
weapons.description: Four rotating barrels firing spread shots.

weapons.name: Black Talon
weapons.description: Heavy attack launches Void projectiles.

weapons.name: Thunderlord
weapons.description: Kills create lightning strikes. Rate of fire increases while holding trigger.

hunter.name: Shards of Galanor
hunter.description: Blade Barrage hits and kills return Super energy.

hunter.name: Oathkeeper
hunter.description: Bows charge faster and can be held indefinitely at full draw.

hunter.name: Sixth Coyote
hunter.description: Grants a second Dodge charge.

hunter.name: The Bombardiers
hunter.description: Dodging leaves behind a bomb that detonates.

titan.name: One-Eyed Mask
titan.description: Marks enemies who damage you. Killing marked enemy triggers health regen.

titan.name: Ursa Furiosa
titan.description: Blocking damage with Sentinel Shield returns Super energy.

titan.name: Heart of Inmost Light
titan.description: Using one ability empowers the other two. Stacks 2x.

titan.name: Antaeus Wards
titan.description: Sliding reflects projectiles. Grants Super energy on reflect.

warlock.name: Contraverse Hold
warlock.description: Charged Void grenades return grenade energy on hit.

warlock.name: Phoenix Protocol
warlock.description: Kills and assists in Well of Radiance return Super energy.

warlock.name: Geomag Stabilizers
warlock.description: Chaos Reach lasts longer when damaging enemies. Sprint to top off Super.

warlock.name: Chromatic Fire
warlock.description: Kinetic precision kills create elemental explosions matching subclass.

seals.name: Cursebreaker
seals.title: Cursebreaker
seals.note: Bones/Eggs require multiple weeks due to Ascendant Challenge rotation

backbone.narrative: Ada-1 guards the secrets of the Black Armory, ancient weapon foundries from the Golden Age. Forge legendary weapons in four hidden forges.

raids.name: Scourge of the Past
raids.description: A Fallen heist in the Last City. Giant mech boss fight.

activities.name: Black Armory Forges
activities.description: Volundr, Gofannon, Izanami, Bergusia forges

weapons.name: Izanagi's Burden
weapons.description: Hold reload to consume all 4 rounds into one Honed Edge shot. Massive damage.

weapons.name: Jötunn
weapons.description: Fires a tracking Solar fireball. Toast your enemies.

weapons.name: Le Monarque
weapons.description: Perfect draw shots apply Void poison. Precision hits spread poison.

weapons.name: Anarchy
weapons.description: Fires Arc mines that chain lightning between them. Excellent boss DPS.

weapons.name: The Last Word
weapons.description: Fan-fire Hand Cannon. Hip-fire for fastest TTK in the game.

backbone.narrative: The Drifter's past and allegiances come into question. Choose to side with the Vanguard or the Drifter in the Allegiance quest.

exoticMissions.name: Zero Hour
exoticMissions.description: Infiltrate the Old Tower to stop a Fallen heist. Timed mission.
exoticMissions.note: Free for all players! One of the best exotic missions.

activities.name: Gambit Prime
activities.description: Hardcore Gambit with roles (Reaper, Collector, Sentry, Invader)

activities.name: The Reckoning
activities.description: Horde mode in the Nine's realm. Tier I-III.

weapons.name: Thorn
weapons.lore: The weapon of Dredgen Yor. Mark of the Devourer.
weapons.description: Rounds pierce targets and apply poison DOT. Kills leave Remnants that boost next mag.

weapons.name: Outbreak Perfected
weapons.description: Precision hits create SIVA nanites that attack and boost damage. Stacks with fireteam.

weapons.name: Arbalest
weapons.description: Kinetic linear fusion. Fires slugs that disrupt elemental shields.

hunter.name: Liar's Handshake
hunter.description: Cross Counter: Powerful melee after being hit or dodging.

titan.name: Stronghold
titan.description: Sword guard has no drain. Heals on perfect guard.

warlock.name: Getaway Artist
warlock.description: Convert grenade into Arc Soul turret that follows you.

seals.name: Reckoner
seals.title: Reckoner
seals.note: Considered the hardest seal ever. No longer obtainable.

backbone.narrative: Emperor Calus invites Guardians to the Menagerie, a grand arena aboard the Leviathan. Craft your perfect weapons using the Chalice of Opulence.

raids.name: Crown of Sorrow
raids.description: Gahlran, the Sorrow-Bearer wields a Hive artifact.

activities.name: The Menagerie
activities.description: 6-player matchmade activity. Use Chalice runes to target loot.

activities.name: Tribute Hall
activities.description: Personal space for testing weapons. Bad Juju quest location.

weapons.name: Lumina
weapons.description: Kills drop Noble Rounds. Fire at allies to heal them and boost damage.

weapons.name: Truth
weapons.description: Aggressive tracking rockets. Prototype Trueseeker.

weapons.name: Bad Juju
weapons.description: String of Curses: Kills reload magazine and grant Super energy.

weapons.name: Tarrabah
weapons.description: Ravenous Beast: Store damage dealt/received, release for bonus damage.

backbone.narrative: Eris Morn discovers a Pyramid ship buried beneath the Moon. Nightmares of fallen enemies manifest. The Darkness speaks for the first time.

campaigns.name: Shadowkeep Campaign
campaigns.description: Investigate the Pyramid ship. Confront Nightmares of your past. First contact with the Darkness.

raids.name: Garden of Salvation
raids.description: Enter the Black Garden to stop a Vex invasion. Contains Divinity puzzle.

exoticQuest.name: Divinity
exoticQuest.note: Must complete puzzle AND kill final boss in same run

dungeons.name: Pit of Heresy
dungeons.description: Descend into Hive crypts. Required for Xenophage quest.

exoticMissions.name: The Whisper
exoticMissions.description: Jump puzzle and combat gauntlet. One of the best missions in Destiny.
exoticMissions.note: Free for all players! Masterpiece of mission design.

activities.name: Nightmare Hunts
activities.description: Hunt Nightmares of fallen enemies. 3 weekly rotating.

activities.name: Altars of Sorrow
activities.description: Wave-based horde activity. 5 tiers + Nightmare boss.

activities.name: Lectern of Enchantment
activities.description: Craft Moon weapons using Nightmare Essences.

activities.name: Vex Offensive
activities.description: Season of the Undying 6-player activity. Defeat Vex on the Moon.

weapons.name: Xenophage
weapons.description: Fires explosive rounds. No precision damage but massive per-shot damage.

weapons.name: Deathbringer
weapons.description: Rockets detonate into Void orbs that track enemies. Higher = more damage.

weapons.name: Divinity
questSteps: Kill final boss in same run
weapons.description: Creates precision damage bubble on target. Team DPS enhancer.

weapons.name: Whisper of the Worm
weapons.description: White Nail: 3 rapid precision hits refill magazine from reserves.

weapons.name: Eriana's Vow
weapons.description: Sniper-like Hand Cannon. Shield-piercing. Anti-Barrier intrinsic.

weapons.name: Leviathan's Breath
weapons.description: Massive heavy bow. Unstoppable rounds. Knockback.

weapons.name: Monte Carlo
weapons.description: Kills reduce melee cooldown. Bayonet melee ability.

hunter.name: Assassin's Cowl
hunter.description: Powered melee/finisher kills grant invisibility and healing.

hunter.name: Khepri's Sting
hunter.description: Smoke bomb applies Truesight. Gain Truesight while crouching.

titan.name: Phoenix Cradle
titan.description: Sun Warrior lasts longer and spreads to allies.

titan.name: Citan's Ramparts
titan.description: Barricade allows shooting through (both ways). Reduced health.

warlock.name: Stormdancer's Brace
warlock.description: Stormtrance kills increase damage. Super energy refund.

warlock.name: Felwinter's Helm
warlock.description: Powered melee/finisher weakens and blinds nearby enemies.

loreBooks.name: Unveiling
loreBooks.note: Critical lore about the Gardener and Winnower

backbone.narrative: Osiris attempts to rescue Saint-14 from the Infinite Forest before his death at the hands of the Vex. Time travel and paradoxes ensue.

campaigns.name: Corridors of Time
campaigns.description: Navigate the time-maze to save Saint-14. Community puzzle event.
campaigns.note: The community solved the maze puzzle together in an amazing event

activities.name: Sundial
activities.description: 6-player matchmade activity through time. Boss rotation.

activities.name: Empyrean Foundation
activities.description: Community donation event to rebuild the Lighthouse

weapons.name: Devil's Ruin
weapons.description: Hold fire for charge-up laser beam. Unstoppable.

weapons.name: Bastion
weapons.description: Kinetic fusion. Fires spread of slug projectiles. Anti-Barrier intrinsic.

weapons.name: Symmetry
weapons.description: Precision hits store stacks. Alt-fire mode fires Arc seekers.

backbone.narrative: The Almighty hurtles toward Earth. Rasputin must be armed with his full power to destroy it. Trials of Osiris returns.

activities.name: Seraph Towers
activities.description: Public event to charge Rasputin's weapons

activities.name: Rasputin Bunkers
activities.description: Clear bunkers to unlock Seraph weapons

activities.name: Trials of Osiris
activities.description: Competitive 3v3 PvP. Win 7 games for Lighthouse access.
activities.note: Returned in this season, still active

activities.name: Guardian Games
activities.description: Annual class competition event. First occurrence.

weapons.name: Fourth Horseman
weapons.description: Full-auto shotgun. Fires all 4 rounds rapidly.

weapons.name: Tommy's Matchbook
weapons.description: Ignition Trigger: Holding fire increases damage but hurts you.

weapons.name: Heir Apparent
weapons.description: Spin-up minigun. Generates Arc shield while spinning.
weapons.note: Only available during Guardian Games event

weapons.name: Felwinter's Lie
weapons.description: Shot Package. Aggressive frame with insane range.

backbone.narrative: The Pyramid ships arrive in the Solar System. Io, Titan, Mercury, and Mars fall to the Darkness. Prepare for the coming storm.

campaigns.name: Means to an End
campaigns.description: Weekly quest. Commune with the Darkness in the Cradle on Io.

dungeons.name: Prophecy
dungeons.description: A gift from the Nine. Light and Dark mechanic. Trippy Taken aesthetics.
dungeons.note: Free for ALL players. One of the best dungeons.

activities.name: Contact
activities.description: Public event on Io and Titan. Taken invasion + Pyramid tech.

activities.name: Interference
activities.description: Weekly story mission. Enter the Cradle and commune with the Darkness.

activities.name: Umbral Engrams
activities.description: First introduction of Umbral Engrams. Now a core system.
activities.note: This system continues in modern Destiny

weapons.name: Witherhoard
weapons.description: Fires blight grenades. Damage over time in area. Direct hits apply blight to target.

weapons.name: Ruinous Effigy
weapons.description: Kills create Transmutation Spheres you can pick up as melee weapons.

weapons.name: Traveler's Chosen
weapons.description: Kills stack Gathering Light. Consume stacks to refill all abilities.

backbone.narrative: Eramis wields Darkness on Europa. The Exo Stranger returns. Guardians embrace Stasis. Discover the secrets of Clovis Bray and the Deep Stone Crypt.

campaigns.name: A Guardian Rises
campaigns.description: Introductory New Light quest. Wake up in the Cosmodrome, meet Shaw Han, and obtain your first ship, sparrow, and Riskrunner exotic.

campaigns.name: Beyond Light Campaign
campaigns.description: Stop Eramis. Unlock Stasis subclass. Meet Clovis Bray AI.

campaigns.name: Born in Darkness
campaigns.description: Post-campaign quest to unlock all Stasis Aspects and Fragments.

raids.name: Deep Stone Crypt
raids.description: Infiltrate the Crypt. Prevent Eramis's forces from stealing Exo tech. Taniks returns.

exoticMissions.name: Presage
exoticMissions.description: Horror-themed mission. Explore the haunted Cabal ship. Hunt the Dark.
exoticMissions.note: Rotates weekly in Exotic Mission playlist. One of the best missions ever.

activities.name: Empire Hunts
activities.description: Hunt Eramis's lieutenants. Farmable for Cloudstrike.

activities.name: Exo Challenges
activities.description: Weekly rotating challenge in Exo simulations.

activities.name: Bray Exoscience
activities.description: Large Bray facility. Contains secrets, scannable lore, and Clovis AI.

weapons.name: The Lament
weapons.description: Revved sword with shield-piercing and healing on damage.

weapons.name: Cloudstrike
weapons.description: Precision kills trigger lightning storms. Rapid kills intensify storm.

weapons.name: Eyes of Tomorrow
weapons.description: Fires volley of tracking rockets that lock onto targets.

weapons.name: No Time To Explain
weapons.description: Precision hits return to magazine. Sustained fire spawns portal turret.

weapons.name: Salvation's Grip
weapons.description: Creates Stasis crystals. Useful for puzzles and platforming.

weapons.name: Dead Man's Tale
weapons.description: Hip-fire bonuses. Chaining precision hits increases damage.

weapons.name: Hawkmoon
weapons.description: Paracausal Shot: Precision hits stack damage for final round.

weapons.name: Duality
weapons.description: Two modes: hip-fire pellets or ADS slug.

weapons.name: Ticuu's Divination
weapons.description: Hip-fire marks targets. ADS shot detonates marked targets.

weapons.name: Cryosthesia 77K
weapons.description: Kills charge freezing shot.

hunter.name: Mask of Bakris
hunter.description: Dodge becomes Shift (blink). Arc weapons boost after Shift.

hunter.name: Athrys's Embrace
hunter.description: Weighted Knife bounces and tracks. Damage boost on precision hits.

hunter.name: Omnioculus
hunter.description: Second smoke bomb charge. Damage resist when making allies invis.

hunter.name: Star-Eater Scales
hunter.description: Orb pickups overcharge Super for bonus damage.

titan.name: Icefall Mantle
titan.description: Barricade becomes Overshield. Can't sprint while active.

titan.name: Precious Scars
titan.description: Revives/finishers heal nearby allies. Energy weapon kills boost ally regen.

titan.name: Cuirass of the Falling Star
titan.description: Thundercrash deals massively increased damage.

titan.name: Path of Burning Steps
titan.description: Solar kills grant stacking weapon damage.

warlock.name: Dawn Chorus
warlock.description: Daybreak projectiles deal bonus damage. Scorch final blows boost damage.

warlock.name: Necrotic Grip
warlock.description: Melee poison spreads to nearby enemies on kill.

warlock.name: Mantle of Battle Harmony
warlock.description: Matching subclass weapon kills boost damage (full Super) or grant Super (not full).

warlock.name: Boots of the Assembler
warlock.description: Rift creates seekers that buff allies.

backbone.narrative: Empress Caiatl arrives seeking an alliance against the Hive. Guardians must prove their worth in the Rite of Proving. Crow's identity crisis deepens.

activities.name: Battlegrounds
activities.description: 3-player matchmade activity. Fight Cabal champions.
activities.note: Integrated into Vanguard Ops playlist briefly, then vaulted

activities.name: Proving Grounds
activities.description: Strike in Caiatl's Land Tank. Face Ignovun.

weapons.name: Ticuu's Divination
weapons.description: Hip-fire marks targets. ADS detonates marks. Chain explosions.

weapons.name: Dead Man's Tale
weapons.description: Hip-fire bonuses. Cranial Spike stacks damage.
weapons.note: Originally released S13, now in Exotic Mission rotator

backbone.narrative: The Vex trap the Last City in an Endless Night. Mithrax and House Light ally with Guardians. Become a Splicer to hack the Vex network.

raids.name: Vault of Glass
raids.description: The classic Destiny 1 raid returns! Atheon, Time's Conflux awaits.

activities.name: Override
activities.description: 6-player matchmade activity. Hack into Vex network.

activities.name: Expunge
activities.description: Solo/matchmade missions inside the Vex network.

weapons.name: Cryosthesia 77K
weapons.description: LN2 Burst: Kills charge freezing shot.

weapons.name: Vex Mythoclast
weapons.description: Full-auto Solar fusion rifle in primary slot. Kills charge Linear mode.

backbone.narrative: Mara Sov returns. Savathûn is captured in a crystal. Xivu Arath's forces attack. The longest season—6 months leading to Witch Queen.

dungeons.name: Grasp of Avarice
dungeons.description: A celebration of loot and greed. Gjallarhorn quest completion location.

activities.name: Astral Alignment
activities.description: 6-player matchmade activity in the Dreaming City.

activities.name: Shattered Realm
activities.description: Weekly rotating mission. Ascendant Plane exploration.

activities.name: Wayfinder's Voyage
activities.description: Weekly story progression. Build to Witch Queen.

activities.name: Dares of Eternity
activities.description: 6-player game show by Xûr. Random encounters, random loot.

activities.name: Xûr's Treasure Hoard
activities.description: Spend Strange Coins and Treasure Keys for loot.
activities.note: Sells Forerunner quest, older exotics, 30th Anniversary gear

weapons.name: Lorentz Driver
weapons.description: Precision kills create telemetry patterns. Collect for damage boost.

weapons.name: Ager's Scepter
weapons.description: Slowing/freezing beam. With catalyst: drain Super for overcharge.

weapons.name: Gjallarhorn
weapons.description: The legend returns. Wolfpack Rounds. Grants Pack Hunter to allies' rockets.

weapons.name: Forerunner
weapons.description: Halo Magnum tribute. Special ammo sidearm with frag grenade alt-fire.
weapons.note: Free for all players via Dares!

backbone.narrative: Savathûn has stolen the Light. The Lucent Hive wield Ghost-granted powers. Uncover the truth in her Throne World. The Darkness reveals more secrets.

campaigns.name: The Witch Queen Campaign
campaigns.description: Considered the best Destiny campaign ever. Face Lucent Hive. Discover truth about the Traveler.
campaigns.note: HIGHLY recommended on Legendary difficulty. Solo-able but challenging.

raids.name: Vow of the Disciple
raids.description: Enter the sunken Pyramid. Face Rhulk, Disciple of the Witness.

exoticMissions.name: Vox Obscura
exoticMissions.description: Tank mission! Stop Caiatl's rogue Psions.

activities.name: The Wellspring
activities.description: 6-player attack/defend activity. Daily rotating bosses.
activities.weaponRotation: Each boss drops specific weapon pattern

activities.name: PsiOps Battlegrounds
activities.description: Season of the Risen activity. Link with Psions, fight Lucent Hive.

activities.name: Altar of Reflection
activities.description: Replayable story missions. Savathûn's memories.

activities.name: Weapon Crafting (The Enclave)
activities.description: New system! Craft weapons with specific perks using Deepsight Resonance.
activities.note: Core system introduced here. Still active.

weapons.name: Osteo Striga
weapons.description: Toxic rounds track targets. Kills spawn tracking seekers. Poison DOT.

weapons.name: Dead Messenger
weapons.description: Fires wave of elemental energy. Swap elements on kills.

weapons.name: Parasite
weapons.description: Fires a Hive worm. Damage scales with kills before firing (Worm's Hunger).

weapons.name: Collective Obligation
weapons.description: Leeches Void debuffs from enemies and applies them to targets.

weapons.name: Grand Overture
weapons.description: Slug launcher mode fires missiles. Arc damage mode fires slugs.

hunter.name: Renewal Grasps
hunter.description: Duskfield grenade creates crystal that reduces damage for allies and enemies.

hunter.name: Caliban's Hand
hunter.description: Proximity Knife ignites targets. Ignitions recharge knife.

hunter.name: Gyrfalcon's Hauberk
hunter.description: Volatile rounds and reserve overshield when exiting invis.

titan.name: Hoarfrost-Z
titan.description: Barricade becomes wall of Stasis crystals.

titan.name: Loreley Splendor
titan.description: Auto-creates Sunspot when critically wounded. Massive healing.
titan.note: Nerfed but still excellent for survivability

titan.name: Second Chance
titan.description: Two Shield Throw charges. Shield stuns Barrier Champions.

warlock.name: Osmiomancy Gloves
warlock.description: Two Coldsnap grenade charges. Better tracking and refund on freeze.

warlock.name: Secant Filaments
warlock.description: Empowering Rift grants Devour. Disrupts Overload Champions.

warlock.name: Rain of Fire
warlock.description: Fusion kills while airborne reload weapons. Air dodge reloads equipped.

backbone.narrative: The Leviathan returns, infested with Nightmares. Calus communes with the Witness. Crow, Zavala, and Caiatl confront their pasts.

dungeons.name: Duality
dungeons.description: Enter Calus's mindscape. Swap between nightmare and reality.

activities.name: Nightmare Containment
activities.description: Public event on Derelict Leviathan. Tiers I-III.

activities.name: Sever
activities.description: Weekly story missions. Help characters confront nightmares.

weapons.name: Trespasser
weapons.description: Unrepentant: Reloading after kill loads special burst.

weapons.name: Heartshadow
weapons.description: Heavy attack while invisible deals massive damage and makes you invis.

hunter.name: Blight Ranger
hunter.description: Deflected damage increases Arc Staff deflection damage.

titan.name: Cadmus Ridge Lancecap
titan.description: Glacier Grenade gains extra crystal. DR in grenade radius.

warlock.name: Fallen Sunstar
warlock.description: Ionic Traces track further and give energy to allies.

backbone.narrative: Eramis returns! Pirate crews seek relics of Nezarec. Captain your Ketch, hunt pirates, build an unlikely crew.

raids.name: King's Fall
raids.description: The Taken King raid returns! Face Oryx, the Taken King.

dungeons.name: Spire of the Watcher
dungeons.description: Climb the Seraph spire. Wild West aesthetic. Wire puzzle mechanics.

activities.name: Ketchcrash
activities.description: 6-player matchmade activity. Board enemy Ketches.

activities.name: Expedition
activities.description: 3-player matchmade. Collect treasure, fight pirates.

activities.name: Pirate Hideouts
activities.description: Weekly story missions hunting pirate captains.

weapons.name: Delicate Tomb
weapons.description: Ionic Traces generated on kill. Absorb traces for extra damage.

weapons.name: Touch of Malice
weapons.description: Final round drains your life for bonus damage. Synergy with healing builds.

weapons.name: Hierarchy of Needs
weapons.description: Fires tracking projectiles after kills.

hunter.name: Speedloader Slacks
hunter.description: Final blows grant stacking reload speed bonus.

titan.name: Point-Contact Cannon Brace
titan.description: Thunderclap range extended. Jolted targets enhance damage.

warlock.name: Briarbinds
warlock.description: Threadling burst generates Threadlings. Track and create more.

backbone.narrative: Rasputin and Ana Bray fight to stop Xivu Arath. Clovis Bray's betrayal revealed. Seraph stations activated across the system.

exoticMissions.name: Operation: Seraph's Shield
exoticMissions.description: Infiltrate Seraph station. Die Hard in space.

activities.name: Heist Battlegrounds
activities.description: 3-player matchmade. Steal from Xivu Arath's forces.

activities.name: More Than a Weapon
activities.description: Weekly story progression leading to Operation Seraph.

weapons.name: Revision Zero
weapons.description: Two firing modes: Pulse or precision sniper mode.

weapons.name: Verglas Curve
weapons.description: Freezing arrows. Shatter frozen targets. Creates Stasis crystals.

backbone.narrative: The Witness has attacked Earth. Shadow Legion occupies the Last City. Rescue prisoners and mount the Defiance.

raids.name: Root of Nightmares
raids.description: A Pyramid ship crashes on Earth. Pursue Nezarec, Final God of Pain.

dungeons.name: Ghosts of the Deep
dungeons.description: Return to Titan. Lucent Hive Necromancy. Summon ritual.

exoticMissions.name: //NODE.OVRD.AVALON//
exoticMissions.description: Enter the Vex Network to forge Vexcalibur.
exoticMissions.note: Vaulted in S24. Vexcalibur in kiosk.

activities.name: Defiant Battlegrounds
activities.description: 3-player matchmade. Rescue prisoners from Shadow Legion.

weapons.name: Vexcalibur
weapons.description: Blocking grants overshield. Shield shots heal allies.

weapons.name: Conditional Finality
weapons.description: Dual-element shotgun. Freezes then ignites. Incredible burst damage.

weapons.name: Navigator
weapons.description: Strand trace rifle. Creates Threadlings. Grants Woven Mail on multikills.

weapons.name: Quicksilver Storm
weapons.description: Grenades track targets. Creates Tangles on kills.

weapons.name: Winterbite
weapons.description: Heavy Stasis glaive. Freezing blast.

backbone.narrative: Neomuna falls under siege by the Shadow Legion. Strand subclass unlocked. The Veil discovered. Prepare for the confrontation with the Witness.

campaigns.name: Lightfall Campaign
campaigns.description: Defend Neomuna. Unlock Strand. Face Calus as Disciple.
campaigns.note: Story controversial but gameplay excellent on Legendary

campaigns.name: Strand Meditations
campaigns.description: Post-campaign quests to unlock all Strand Aspects and Fragments.

dungeons.name: Warlord's Ruin
dungeons.description: Dark Age castle. Ahamkara corruption. Stunning visuals.

exoticMissions.name: Starcrossed
exoticMissions.description: Navigate Ahamkara-twisted Black Garden. Riven's last wish.

activities.name: Terminal Overload
activities.description: Public event across Neomuna zones. Rotating weekly.

activities.name: Salvage
activities.description: Season of the Deep activity with Sloane.

activities.name: Deep Dive
activities.description: Submersible combat in the depths of Titan.

weapons.name: Final Warning
weapons.description: Lock-on tracking sidearm. Sever targets.

weapons.name: Deterministic Chaos
weapons.description: Every 4th shot weakens. Every 16th shot is volatile.

weapons.name: Wish-Keeper
weapons.description: Freezing arrows. Wishful Ignorance AoE freezes.

weapons.name: Buried Bloodline
weapons.description: Fires tracking bolts. Devour synergy.

hunter.name: Cyrtarachne's Facade
hunter.description: Grapple grants Woven Mail.

hunter.name: Mothkeeper's Wraps
hunter.description: Grenade becomes moths that seek and weaken.

titan.name: Abeyant Leap
titan.description: Drengr's Lash spawns extra projectiles and suspends.

titan.name: Arbor Warden
titan.description: Barricade creates Saplings that heal allies.

warlock.name: Swarmers
warlock.description: Threadling generation is boosted. Threadlings apply Unravel.

warlock.name: Cenotaph Mask
warlock.description: Damaging Champions marks them. Killing marked grants special ammo.

backbone.narrative: Eris Morn undergoes transformation. The Hive gods' power is needed to enter the Traveler's Pale Heart. Tithing and ritual magic.

raids.name: Crota's End
raids.description: The classic D1 raid returns! Slay Crota, Son of Oryx.

activities.name: Altars of Summoning
activities.description: Wave-based summoning activity on the Moon.

activities.name: Savathûn's Spire
activities.description: 3-player climbing activity.

weapons.name: Necrochasm
weapons.description: Kills cause Cursed Thrall explosions. Explosions spread.

weapons.name: Wicked Implement
weapons.description: Precision hits slow targets. Headshots while slowed create Stasis crystal.

weapons.name: Ex Diris
weapons.description: Creates web of Strand traps.

hunter.name: Triton Vice
hunter.description: Glaive projectile lifesteal and special ammo.

titan.name: Wormgod Caress
titan.description: Already existed but became meta for throwing hammer builds.

warlock.name: Ballidorse Wrathweavers
warlock.description: Winter's Wrath deals more damage and shatters targets.

backbone.narrative: Riven's final gambit. The Dreaming City's curse must end. Prepare for the Final Shape. Crow and Mara reconcile.

activities.name: Riven's Lair
activities.description: 3-player activity battling Riven-touched enemies.

activities.name: Coil
activities.description: Roguelike dungeon-style activity. Random encounters.

weapons.name: Tessellation
weapons.description: Converts equipped grenade element. Uses grenade energy.

backbone.narrative: Enter the Pale Heart of the Traveler. The final confrontation with the Witness. Cayde-6 returns. Destiny's 10-year saga concludes.

campaigns.name: The Final Shape Campaign
campaigns.description: The culmination of Destiny's story. Fight the Witness. Save reality. Incredible finale.
campaigns.note: CRITICAL: The best campaign in Destiny history. Do on Legendary.

campaigns.name: Prismatic Fragment Quests
campaigns.description: Post-campaign quests to unlock all Prismatic abilities.

raids.name: Salvation's Edge
raids.description: Enter the Witness's domain. The final raid of the Light and Dark saga.

dungeons.name: Vesper's Host
dungeons.description: Explore a derelict colony ship. Raksil, Arcology Warden awaits.
dungeons.note: Icebreaker returns! Heavy sniper with regenerating ammo.

exoticMissions.name: Dual Destiny
exoticMissions.description: Two-player puzzle mission. Unlock Exotic class items.

reward.name: Exotic Class Items
reward.description: Random rolls with two exotic perks!

activities.name: Overthrows
activities.description: Zone control events across Pale Heart. Multiple tiers.

activities.name: Cyst Missions
activities.description: Combat challenges in Witness corruption nodes.

activities.name: Episode: Echoes
activities.description: Post-campaign content. Three acts throughout the season.
activities.note: New seasonal structure - Episodes replace Seasons

weapons.name: Still Hunt
weapons.description: Cayde-6's final gift. Golden Gun super when charged. Insane DPS.

weapons.name: Khvostov 7G-0X
weapons.description: The weapon that started it all. Now with customizable modes.

weapons.name: Microcosm
weapons.description: Heavy trace rifle. Charges with Light/Dark orbs for massive damage.

weapons.name: Euphony
weapons.description: Stasis LFR from the final raid. Unique perks.

weapons.name: Icebreaker
weapons.description: THE D1 legend returns. Regenerates ammo. No Ice breaking. Heavy slot.

hunter.name: Gifted Conviction
hunter.description: Exotic class item with random dual perks.

hunter.name: Huntress of the Seven Winds
hunter.description: New exotic set from Legendary campaign.

titan.name: Stoicism
titan.description: Exotic class item with random dual perks.

titan.name: Hazardous Propulsion
titan.description: Thundercrash leaves damaging field.

warlock.name: Solipsism
warlock.description: Exotic class item with random dual perks.

warlock.name: Speaker's Sight
warlock.description: Grants healing turret on Rift. Game-changing.

backbone.narrative: Fikrul and the Scorn return. The aftermath of the Witness's defeat. Three-act Episode structure continues.

activities.name: Revenant Activities
activities.description: Episode-specific activities.

backbone.narrative: The Hive return. Preparing for what comes after the Witness.
New expansion. The next chapter of Destiny begins. Details still emerging.
Current season. The latest content in Destiny 2.

seasonalEvents.description: Recurring seasonal events with limited-time activities, cosmetics, and exclusive rewards

events.name: The Dawning
events.description: Winter celebration. Bake cookies for vendors, earn holiday rewards.

activities.name: Cookie Baking
activities.description: Collect ingredients, combine recipes, deliver to characters

activities.name: Starlight Vigil
activities.description: Match-made activity introduced in recent years

events.note: Good source of Enhancement Cores from deliveries

events.name: Crimson Days
events.description: Couples-themed event. 2v2 Crucible mode. No longer active.
events.note: Has not returned since 2020. Effectively discontinued.

events.name: Solstice of Heroes
events.description: Summer celebration. Upgrade armor through gameplay. EAZ activity.

activities.name: Bonfire Bash
activities.description: Collect silver leaves, ignite bonfire, defeat bosses

activities.name: Solstice Armor Upgrades
activities.description: Complete objectives to upgrade armor glows

events.note: Great for getting high-stat armor. Glows are cosmetic reward.

events.name: Festival of the Lost
events.description: Halloween celebration. Haunted activities, masks, spooky loot.

activities.name: Haunted Lost Sectors
activities.description: Spooky versions of Lost Sectors with Headless Ones

activities.name: Haunted Sectors (6-player)
activities.description: Match-made Haunted activity

events.masks: Festival Masks (cosmetic helmets with special effects)
events.note: Masks are fun cosmetics. Good weapon farming opportunity.

events.name: The Revelry
events.description: Spring celebration in the Verdant Forest. Only occurred once in 2019.
events.note: Replaced by Guardian Games. No longer active.

events.name: Guardian Games
events.description: Class competition. Hunters vs Titans vs Warlocks. Earn medals, crown a winner.

activities.name: Guardian Games Playlist
activities.description: Compete in strikes/activities to earn medals

activities.name: Competitive Catalyst
activities.description: Earn the seasonal exotic's catalyst through competition

exotics.name: Heir Apparent
exotics.note: Now obtainable via Exotic Kiosk during GG

events.class_item: Commemorative class items with year winner
events.note: Good for catching up on catalysts. Class rivalry is fun but low stakes.

seasonalEvents.eventCurrency: Each event has its own currency that resets. Spend before event ends.

crucible.description: Player vs Player competitive multiplayer content

playlists.name: Control
playlists.description: 6v6. Capture zones, eliminate opponents. Most popular mode.

playlists.name: Trials of Osiris
playlists.description: 3v3 Elimination. Win 7 games to go Flawless. Pinnacle PvP.
playlists.note: High difficulty. Pool gets easier Sunday after flawless players leave.

playlists.name: Iron Banner
playlists.description: 6v6 Control with Power Level enabled. Lord Saladin's event.
playlists.note: Power level matters! Good for Pinnacle farming.

ranks.resets: Resetting rank grants enhanced rewards and progress toward seasonal challenges

crucible.metaNote: PvP meta shifts with sandbox updates. Check community resources for current meta.

gambit.description: PvPvE hybrid mode. Race to summon and defeat Primeval while invading opponents.

mechanics.objective: Collect Motes from enemies, bank them, summon Primeval, defeat it first

invasions.trigger: 25/50/75/100 motes banked OR during Primeval phase
invasions.kills: Each Guardian killed heals enemy Primeval

primeval.envoys: Kill Envoys to activate Primeval Slayer buff

playlists.name: Gambit
playlists.description: Standard Gambit. One round, first to kill Primeval wins.

exotics.name: Malfeasance
exotics.description: Still available for free! One of the best Gambit weapons.
exotics.perk: Bonus damage vs Taken, Gambit invaders, and blockers

tips: 15 motes = Large Blocker but high risk. 10 is often safer.
Invade with Super or power ammo for best results
Coordinate with team on who invades
gambit.note: Gambit population is lower than other modes but still active

sealsComprehensive.description: All seals (titles) in Destiny 2 with current availability

seals.name: Conqueror
seals.title: Conqueror
requirements: Complete all GMs in a season
seals.note: Gildable - complete all GMs again each season for gilded title

seals.name: Flawless
seals.title: Flawless
seals.note: Gildable - requires flawless runs each season

seals.name: Unbroken
seals.title: Unbroken
requirements: Reach Legend Glory rank in 3 different seasons

sealsComprehensive.note: Seasonal seals typically vault when their season content is removed. Raid/Dungeon seals persist.

monumentToLostLights.description: Exotic Kiosk in the Tower for obtaining vaulted exotic weapons

planetaryMaterials.note: Being phased out - use Spider/Rahool to convert

tier2_Recommended.name: Thorn
tier2_Recommended.reason: DOT Hand Cannon, pairs with Necrotic Grip

monumentToLostLights.note: Don't waste Ciphers on world drop exotics - wait for them from Engrams

exoticMissionRotator.description: Weekly rotating exotic missions accessible to all players with the relevant expansion
exoticMissionRotator.rotationNote: One mission featured per week. All available on rotation.

braveArsenal.description: Re-issued legacy weapons from Into the Light event (Season 23). Available from various playlist activities.
braveArsenal.note: Many sunset pinnacle/ritual weapons returned with updated perks

newLightPath.description: Recommended path for New Light (free) players
